title: Deens Academy Model United Nations (Grade 7 - 2024/25)
description: Received participation recognition for representing the Deens Academy Model United Nations Special Political and Decolonisation Junior Committee (SPECPOL), where we reached a resolution within two days and I raised a bias query with the Speaker.
